title: mrqx`s Slashblade Core
description: A library for developing mods for Slashblade: Resharped.
body:
# mrqx`s Slashblade Core  

A library for developing **mods** for **Slashblade: Resharped**.  

# What Can It Do?  

## For Developers  
Check the [GitHub Wiki](https://github.com/mrqx0195/mrqx-s-Slashblade-Core/wiki) for detailed information.  

## For Players  
**Install this mod only if required by other mods.**  
Always remember: Installing a mod without any need is **extremely unwise**.  

# License  

This mod is open-source under the GPL v3.0 License.

You may include it in your modpacks/servers as long as you **comply with the license terms**.
